hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.rb$'; then bundle exec rubocop --autocorrect "$f"; else true; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then npx tsc --noEmit; else true; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then result=$(npx eslint "$f" 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then jq -n --arg ctx "ESLint errors in $f. Fix them: $result" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":$ctx}}'; fi; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -q '.progress/issue-'; then jq -n '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"progress file updated. Proceed to the next step."}}'; fi; }
